stories.title: The Best AI Degrees And How To Choose The Right Major
stories.simple_summary: An article about which college degrees to study if you want to work with AI, and how to pick the right one.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to students and parents thinking about college — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: 3 Phenomenal Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks to Buy Before They Report Earnings
stories.simple_summary: An article recommending certain AI company stocks to buy before they announce their financial results.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.simple_summary: Meta (which owns Instagram) turned off a feature that let people create fake AI pictures of other people.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, this is good news — fewer fake deepfake images of real people will be made without permission.

stories.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.simple_summary: Meta removed an Instagram feature that let anyone create AI images pretending to be public accounts, without asking permission first.
stories.why_it_matters: If you or your business has a public Instagram account, this protects you from imposters using your image without your say-so.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI, alleging artificial intelligence company stole trade secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI, claiming that some of OpenAI's workers who used to work at Apple stole secret information about Apple's devices.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a legal battle between tech giants — nothing you need to worry about.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI and other companies, claiming their former employees stole Apple's secret hardware information and gave it to OpenAI.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a legal dispute between large tech companies — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.simple_summary: Apple is taking OpenAI to court for allegedly stealing Apple's trade secrets (secret recipes for how they build things), supposedly ordered by OpenAI's leaders.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a corporate legal case between tech giants — nothing that affects your daily life.

stories.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.simple_summary: More and more companies are using AI tools that are free and shared openly (like a library) instead of paying companies for private AI.
stories.why_it_matters: If your small business uses AI tools, there are now more free options available, which could save you money.

stories.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.simple_summary: A Korean chip-making company raised a huge amount of money and is being encouraged to build factories in America to make AI computer chips.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and tech companies — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: How KTern.AI built agentic AI for SAP on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
stories.simple_summary: A company built a smart AI assistant that works with Amazon's services to help manage business software.
stories.why_it_matters: This is technical business software mostly for large companies — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
stories.simple_summary: More companies are choosing to build and run their own AI tools instead of paying to rent them from big tech companies.
stories.why_it_matters: If your business uses AI, owning your own tools might become cheaper than renting — this trend could save you money over time.

stories.title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
stories.simple_summary: Instagram's leader says he won't hide AI-made posts, but says you can choose not to see them if you want.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, you may get options to control whether you see AI-generated content in your feed.
